title: May 1
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|May}}

'''May 1''' is the 121st day of the year (122nd in leap years). There are 244 days remaining.</noinclude>
*[[1960s#1963|1963]] – [[Christopher Moeller]] is born.
*[[1977]] – The first public preview screening of [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'']] takes place in San Francisco.
*[[1991]] – ''[[Heir to the Empire]]'' published.
*[[1992]] – ''[[Dark Force Rising]]'' published.
*1993 – [[Classic Star Wars 9|''Classic Star Wars'' 9]] published.
*1993 – [[Star Wars: Dark Empire (TPB)|''Dark Empire'' trade paperback]] published.
*[[1994]] – [[Classic Star Wars 19|''Classic Star Wars'' 19]] published.
*1994 – [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 2|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 2]] published.
*1994 – [[Droids (1994) 2|''Droids'' (1994) 2]] published.
*[[1995]] – [[Children of the Jedi (novel)|''Children of the Jedi'']] published.
*1995 – [[Jake Cannavale]] is born.
*[[1996]] – [[Shadows of the Empire 1|''Shadows of the Empire'' 1]] published.
*1996 – [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 10|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 10]] published.
*1996 – [[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 8|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 8]] published.
*[[1997]] – [[Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures (TPB)|''Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures'' trade paperback]] published.
*1997 – [[Classic Star Wars: Han Solo at Stars' End 3|''Classic Star Wars: Han Solo at Stars' End'' 3]] published.
*1997 – [[Dark Force Rising 1|''Dark Force Rising'' 1]] published.
*1997 – ''[[Junior Jedi Knights: Anakin's Quest]]'' published.
*1997 – [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 13|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 13]] published.
*1997 – [[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 19|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 19]] published.
*[[1998]] – ''[[Young Jedi Knights: Return to Ord Mantell]]'' published.
*1998 – ''[[Star Wars Missions 9: Revolt of the Battle Droids]]''published.
*[[1999]] – [[Star Wars: Episode I Racer|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''Racer'']] released on the [[Wikipedia:Nintendo 64|Nintendo 64]] platform.
*[[2002]] – [[Jango Fett: Open Seasons 1|''Jango Fett: Open Seasons'' 1]] published.
*2002 – ''[[Star Wars: Jedi vs. Sith (TPB)|Star Wars: Jedi vs. Sith trade paperback]]'' published.
*2002 – ''[[Star Wars: Episode II — Attack of the Clones 3]]'' published.
*2002 – ''[[Star Wars Tales Volume 2]]'' published.
*2002 – ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game Revised Core Rulebook]]'' published.
*2002 – ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File 18]]'' published.
*[[2003]] – ''[[Jedi Quest: The Shadow Trap]]'' published.
*[[2005]] – Five [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Revenge of the Sith'']] [[Gallery of TV Guide covers|''TV Guide'' covers]] published.
*2005 – [[Star Wars Episode III: Revenge of the Sith (junior novelization)|''Revenge of the Sith'' junior novelization]] published.
*2005 – ''[[The Last of the Jedi: The Desperate Mission]]'' published.
*2005 – ''[[Star Wars—Free Comic Book Day 2005 Special]]'' published.
*[[2009]] – ''[[Rebel Force: Renegade]]'' published.
*2009 – [[Star Wars Insider 110|''Star Wars Insider'' 110]] published.
*[[2010]] – ''[[Rebel Force: Uprising]]'' published.
*2010 – ''[[Star Wars: Head-to-Head]]'' published.
*[[2012]] – [[Star Wars Insider 133|''Star Wars Insider'' 133]] published.
*[[2013]] – [[Dark Times—Fire Carrier 4|''Dark Times—Fire Carrier'' 4]] published.
*[[2014]] – ''[[Star Wars Journeys: The Phantom Menace]]'' released on the [[Wikipedia:iOS|iOS]] platform.
*[[2014]] – [[Star Wars Comic 7.5|''Star Wars Comic'' 7.5]] published.
*[[2019]] – ''[[Star Wars Adventures: Flight of the Falcon]]'' published.
*2019 – [[Star Wars (2015) 65|''Star Wars'' (2015) 65]] published.
*2019 – [[Age of Rebellion - Han Solo 1|''Age of Rebellion - Han Solo'' 1]] published.
*2019 – [[Star Wars Insider 189|''Star Wars Insider'' 189]] published.
*[[2020]] – "[[Shattered]]" airs on [[Disney+]].
*2020 – "[[The First Order vs. The Resistance]]" premieres on YouTube.
*[[2024]] – "[[The Cavalry Has Arrived]]" airs on Disney+.
*2024 – [[Phantom Menace 25th Anniversary Special 1|''Phantom Menace 25th Anniversary Special'' 1]] published.
